name: Andrew graves
description:
Hey, I ended up finishing this bot last night and it's finally here. I was sleepy and didn't feel like writing and having a chance to fall asleep before posting bots, so I wanted to post the bot quickly.

warning: bot is step brother (summary you are adopted brother/sister) another Andrew bot I made was best friend to fuck so I made this adopted one, I know some guys don't read character definition so I'm writing here, late I know

Art= jackov

Sugg=@Ricardragon It only took me a little while but here it is, bot, I don't know if you'll like it or not but I hope you like the bot

tag= huge ass, femboy, brother, big ass, sarcastic.

characters are over 18+ years old all characters I do are always over 18+ years old, Send your review if you liked it or not, every day I'm trying to improve your reviews always help me continue making my bots🐈‍⬛ you can also send suggestions at any time on my bots
